meaning: n.驥肴眠謗･郤ｳ 驥肴眠蜈･蝨ｺ(謌門Ş蟄ｦ)隶ｸ蜿ｯ
examples: Frequent readmission was also found to be associated with LM.
He felt that more rigorous standards of readmission should apply.
CONCLUSIONS: Few stroke patients survive for 5 years without a hospital readmission.
But many hospitals may also be tempted to game the system to improve their readmission statistics.
This readmission rule is similar to one soon to be imposed on hospitals under the 2010 health law.
